headline: Carrier (CARR) Stock Could Be A Bargain On Cash Flow But Fair On Earnings
summary: Carrier Global stock has delivered a 37.8% gain over the past five years, and today the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate suggests the shares may still trade at a meaningful discount to that calculated value, even though traditional market multiples look roughly in line with the market. Over five years, Carrier Global has returned 37.8%, which points to a stock that has already created value but not in a straight line for holders. For valuation, long term cash flow...

headline: Lennox International (LII) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q2 Release
summary: Lennox (LII) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: 3 Industrials Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
summary: Even if they go mostly unnoticed, industrial businesses are the backbone of our country. Still, their generally high capital requirements expose them to the ups and downs of economic cycles, and the industry’s six-month return of 4.3% has fallen short of the S&P 500’s 7.7% rise.
